title: Do Symbotic’s (SYM) Insider Sale Plans Undercut Confidence In Its Growing Backlog Story?
description:
In recent weeks, Symbotic Inc. has drawn attention as analysts revised earnings estimates while the company remained positioned for strong current-quarter earnings, and an insider filed a Form 144 detailing proposed and past sales of Common A shares through Goldman Sachs.
This combination of changing earnings expectations, a record multi-billion-dollar backlog, and insider share sale intentions has sharpened investor focus on how Symbotic’s operational execution aligns with evolving market...

title: What Happens When AI Takes 15 Million American Jobs ?
description: About 4.3% of America’s workforce is unemployed today, based on the BLS April data. That is about six million people. Credible estimates of AI job destruction range from 11 million by Goldman Sachs to 19 billion by Tufts/Digital Planet. At this high end, 15% of America’s workforce would be out of work, including the 4.3%. ... What Happens When AI Takes 15 Million American Jobs ?

title: xAI tells staff to limit contact with Cursor employees amid potential deal
description: Investing.com -- Employees at Elon Musk’s xAI received instructions from the company’s general counsel to restrict their interactions with workers from Cursor, an AI coding startup that xAI may acquire, Bloomberg reported on Tuesday.

title: Higher oil prices not expected to derail capex growth, Goldman says
description: Investing.com -- U.S. business investment is on track for a solid year, and higher oil prices are unlikely to materially disrupt that trajectory, Goldman Sachs said, raising its full-year capital expenditure growth forecast to 7.8% from 6.5%.

title: VNET Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
description: On the operational side, our wholesale IDC business delivered robust growth driven by strong customer demand and fast customer movements as of March 31, 2026.
